overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a walk through a neon-lit night market. The player follows an NPC to a food stall and observes the vendor working behind a steamy counter with industrial decor and prominent vending machines.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk market walkway with food stalls

events.description: NPC in business suit stops at the food stall counter
camera passes close by the stationary suited NPC

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered cyberpunk market following an NPC, approaching a food stall with neon lighting

notable_agents.action: man in gray business suit walking ahead and stopping at the food counter

entered.detail: bright red vending machine with 'FEEL FREE CHOOH2' branding and white star logo
long food service counter with glass display case and metal frame
industrial wall with circular speaker grilles and metal mesh fencing
tall blue vending machine with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered cyberpunk night market with vibrant neon lighting. The camera follows a suited NPC who stops at a food stall, while a prominent red CHOOH2 vending machine stands on the right. The environment features industrial metal architecture and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall counter with steam and cooking equipment

events.description: camera stops walking and focuses on the food stall counter and vendor
steam from cooking becomes visible rising from behind the counter

agents.ego_description: standing stationary at the food stall counter watching the vendor prepare food

notable_agents.action: food vendor in red pants working behind the counter, handling cooking equipment with steam rising

entered.detail: white steam rising from the cooking area behind the counter

segments.scene_description: Stationary observation at the food stall counter where a vendor works behind steaming cooking equipment. The camera focuses on the food preparation area with industrial metal mesh walls visible to the right, while pedestrians walk past in the background. Steam rises continuously from the cooking surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through a vibrant cyberpunk night market that narrows into an intimate observation of a street food stall. It begins by following a suited NPC through a covered walkway illuminated by neon lights, passing a prominent red CHOOH2 vending machine and industrial metal architecture. As the NPC comes to a halt, the camera shifts from movement to a stationary position at the food stall counter. The scene then focuses on the vendor working behind steaming cooking equipment, with the background blurring into a stream of passing pedestrians. Finally, the view settles on the food preparation area, framed by industrial metal mesh walls and the continuous rise of steam from the heat.
